titleStmt.title: SII 42.32: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 32. (A.R. No. B. 39 of 1953-54.) Cheñchu Eṟṟaguḍi, Dhone Taluk, Kurnool District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab in the compound of the Rāmaliṅgēśvara temple.
The record is dated Śaka 1487, Krōdhana, Bhādrapada, śu. 2, Monday. The date is irregular, may correspond to A.D. 1565, August 27 (Thursday).

Records the gift of some plots of land for various services in the temple of god Rāmēśvara of Yeṟṟaguḍi by Mahānāyaṅkāchārya Mali-nāyuḍu of Kaṁbhālapāḍu for the merit of his father Chevuḍi-nāyuḍu (Cf-No. 30 (A.R. 37 of 1953-54).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Figures of moon and sun; Figures of liṅga, lamp-stand and bull facing the liṅga.

śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbu
lu 1487 Agunanēḍi(ṭi) krōdha
na saṁvatsara bhādrapada śu 2 sō
mavāraṁnāḍu śrīman mahānā
yakācāryulayina kaṁbālapāṭi ma
li(lli)nāyanigāru yarraguḍi rāmēśvara
dēvuniki samarpiṁcina śāsanakramame
ṭlannanu . lakumasāgaraṁ reḍḍi prajalu
māku yici(cci)na mānyaṁ rāmireḍḍi dō
nistaḷaṁ velipolaṁ kha . māridēvireḍi staḷaṁ
varimaḍi kha . vubhayaṁ kha ... nnu reḍi praja
lu makaluvīṭikajayaṁ Avasarānaku
penumaḍagrāmānanu kāḍrē(ṭrē)vuni kanama
staḷaṁ bījavari velipolaṁ kha 0 ... nnu pātra
vāriki yistimi saṁgāla grāmāna reḍi praja
lu kacchavastaḷaṁ velipolaṁ 32 varimaḍi
kha . 3 vubhayaṁ kha . 4 dadhyōdanānaku sama
rpistimi ciṭyāla reḍi karaṇālu māku yi
ccina mānyaṁ varipolaṁ gōtinivāriki pē

ṭa staḷaṁ bījavari kha ...
nnu pallaki śē(sē)vaku sa
marpistimi yī śā(sē)
vē(va) mātaṁḍri cavu
ḍi nāyanki puṇyaṁ
gānu samarpistimi .
gāna yiṁdulaku
ya(E)vvaru tapi(ppi)nānu
tamatallitaṁḍrādulanu
vāraṇāsilō vadhi
yiṁcina vāru .
śrīrāmā nīvē gatti(ti)
Digital edition of SII 42.32 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
